last_insight: Genome representation is sufficient (loss=0.000004 on Gaussian Ring). Bottleneck is fitness function, not model capacity.

depth_log.insight: Evolution stuck at score 11.67. Hypothesis: genome representation too limited.
depth_log.action: Test if genome can express known-good kernels
depth_log.result: SUCCESS - genome is sufficient. Problem is elsewhere.

direction_reason: Fitness function rewards stability, not emergent dynamics. Need to redesign what we're optimizing for.
goal: Create a fitness function that rewards emergent, dynamic patterns instead of static blobs
abort_condition: If 3 consecutive fitness redesigns fail to produce novel patterns, reassess approach
next_actions: Implement pattern diversity metric (entropy over time)
Implement spatial complexity metric (edge density, fractal dimension)
Test new fitness function on known-good kernels (Orbium, Geminium)
Run evolution with new fitness function
